sql_array: CREATE TABLE bpel_instances (id INT PRIMARY KEY, status VARCHAR(20), data TEXT);
INSERT INTO bpel_instances (id, status, data) VALUES (1, 'PENDING', 'data1'), (2, NULL, 'data2'), (3, 'COMPLETED', NULL);
INSERT INTO bpel_instances (id, status, data) VALUES (4, 'ACTIVE', 'data3'), (5, 'COMPLETED', 'data4');
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( (SELECT id + 1 FROM bpel_instances WHERE status IS NULL LIMIT 1) );
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( (SELECT MAX(id) FROM bpel_instances WHERE status = 'COMPLETED') + 5 );
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( (SELECT MIN(id) FROM bpel_instances) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_instances) );
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_instances WHERE data IS NULL) + 1 );
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( (SELECT AVG(COALESCE(id, 0)) FROM bpel_instances) + 10 );
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( 2 + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_instances WHERE status = 'COMPLETED') );
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( 4 + (2 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_instances WHERE status IS NOT NULL)) );
CREATE TABLE temp_bpel (instance_id INT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
INSERT INTO temp_bpel(instance_id) VALUES (5), (6);
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( (SELECT SUM(instance_id) FROM temp_bpel) + 3 );
INSERT INTO temp_bpel(instance_id) VALUES (NULL), (7);
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_bpel WHERE instance_id IS NULL) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_bpel) );
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_instances) > 2 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END + 3 );
CREATE TABLE error_tests (id INT NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO error_tests (id, description) VALUES (1, 'Test A'), (2, 'Test B');
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM error_tests) + NULL );
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.instance_delete( (SELECT id + +2 FROM bpel_instances WHERE status IS NOT NULL) );
